generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? The latest defense budget cuts are putting our national security at risk. While some argue for reducing military spending, experts warn that strategic autonomy requires strong deterrence capabilities. Our allies are increasing their defense budgets - shouldn't we do the same to maintain our leadership role? #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
